decision.summary: No new action: the April 24 daily board is tradable now, but the closest useful strikes still offer weak or expensive entries, so there is no clean edge yet.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 77644.6, with price still near the lower part of the short-term range, shorts dominant, and open interest contracting, which keeps the bearish intraday thesis alive in principle. However, the daily board still does not offer a clean thesis-aligned entry. The nearest downside candidates, 76k dip and 77k dip, price only around 26.5% and 37.5% respectively, both below the preferred 45-84% band, and their asks are still unattractive relative to their implied probabilities. On the upside, 79k reach is only about 36.5% with a 0.45 ask, so it is also below the preferred range and would be a counter-thesis continuation trade rather than a clean setup. The weekly 80k reach remains the only live active thesis position around 32%, while the old weekly 72k dip stays discarded_for_slot and requires no management. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. The correct action is to wait for either a cleaner downside daily near the preferred range or a clearer momentum continuation, instead of forcing an entry from still-marginal prices.
